creator: ivy@FreeBSD.org
text:
this seems to be connected to Kerberos ticket expiry: the problem recurred just now when my ticket expired.  when this happens, klist shows:

% klist
Credentials cache: FILE:/tmp/krb5cc_10006
        Principal: lexi@EDEN.LE-FAY.ORG

  Issued                Expires        Principal
Dec 24 04:13:34 2023  >>>Expired<<<  krbtgt/EDEN.LE-FAY.ORG@EDEN.LE-FAY.ORG
Dec 24 06:58:04 2023  >>>Expired<<<  host/hemlock.eden.le-fay.org@EDEN.LE-FAY.ORG
Dec 24 13:37:42 2023  >>>Expired<<<  nfs/hemlock.eden.le-fay.org@EDEN.LE-FAY.ORG
Dec 24 13:37:42 2023  >>>Expired<<<  nfs/hemlock.eden.le-fay.org@EDEN.LE-FAY.ORG
Dec 24 13:37:42 2023  >>>Expired<<<  nfs/hemlock.eden.le-fay.org@EDEN.LE-FAY.ORG
Dec 24 13:37:42 2023  >>>Expired<<<  nfs/hemlock.eden.le-fay.org@EDEN.LE-FAY.ORG
[... many identical entries elided...]
Dec 24 13:37:42 2023  >>>Expired<<<  nfs/hemlock.eden.le-fay.org@EDEN.LE-FAY.ORG
Dec 24 13:37:42 2023  >>>Expired<<<  nfs/hemlock.eden.le-fay.org@EDEN.LE-FAY.ORG
Dec 24 06:58:04 2023  >>>Expired<<<  host/hemlock.eden.le-fay.org@EDEN.LE-FAY.ORG
Dec 24 06:58:04 2023  >>>Expired<<<  host/hemlock.eden.le-fay.org@EDEN.LE-FAY.ORG

in additional, the 'Invalid' counter in nfsstat -cE increases to 64 (it was previously 0):

Rpc Info:
     TimedOut      Invalid    X Replies      Retries     Requests
            0           64            0            0      4832814

however, the mount never recovers even after renewing the tickets.
